title: Mediocalcar alpinum
taxonomy: Mediocalcar alpinum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This genus, Mediocalcar, is a small group of orchids native to New Guinea and surrounding islands. Mediocalcar alpinum is further grouped into the subfamily Orchidoideae, which includes many terrestrial orchids. The plant's classification is based on its morphology, such as its growth habit, leaf structure, and flower characteristics. The precise classification of Mediocalcar alpinum is further refined through phylogenetic analysis, providing a more detailed understanding of its relationships within the orchid family.
